title: Harris County Boiler Re-Inspection - HRSG-1 and HRSG-2
property_name: Lone Star Power Generation Plant Site
description: TDI boiler certificates for HRSG-1 and HRSG-2 expire June 2026. Schedule Harris County boiler inspector for as-found inspection and recertification. ASME code stamp renewal required. Coordinate with Siemens Energy for documentation package.

title: Stormwater Detention Pond Sediment Survey
property_name: Lone Star Power Generation Plant Site
description: Annual TPDES stormwater permit requires sediment survey of retention pond. Last survey March 2025. Schedule licensed surveyor and coordinate with environmental consultant for TCEQ annual report submission.

title: Control Room HVAC Replacement - Unit 2
description: Control room HVAC unit 2 of 3 has been running on temporary bypass since October 2025. Replacement Daikin commercial unit on order. Critical for control room temperature regulation - DCS and operator workstation cooling. Installation requires 8-hour outage window.

title: Cooling Tower CT-2 Basin Recoating - Completion
property_name: Lone Star Power Generation Plant Site
description: CT-2 basin epoxy recoating 65% complete as of January 2026. Complete remaining west wall and floor sections. Nozzle replacement and fill inspection on schedule for January 31 2026 completion.

title: Emergency Lighting - Turbine Hall Upgrade
description: NFPA 110 inspection identified 14 emergency light fixtures in turbine hall below minimum foot-candle requirement. LED fixture replacement required for OSHA compliance. Work can be done during normal operations with no outage.
